contract_summary: This is a release wrapper intended for use with device-managed resource (devm) frameworks. It cancels any pending role work and drops a reference on the usb_role_switch object. It is typically called automatically during driver unbind or device removal. The caller (via devm) must not call this function directly after registration; the refcount operation ensures the underlying object is released when all references are gone.
